title: wrong or unexpected results in subquery
poc: CREATE TABLE test(date int not null constraint pk_test primary key);
SELECT date, (SELECT date from test where date > t1.date limit 1) as dtNext from test t1;

SELECT date, (SELECT date from test where date > t1.date) as dtNext from test
  t1;
select count(*) as cnt from test;
select date, (select date from test where date > t1.date) as dtNext from test t1;
with GROUP BY fails as well;
key_bug_features: Subquery returning unexpected results with GROUP BY
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2(id int not null constraint pk_test2 primary key, value varchar(50), created_at date);
SELECT id, (SELECT value FROM test2 WHERE created_at > t2.created_at LIMIT 1) AS next_value FROM test2 t2;
SELECT created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test2 WHERE created_at <= t3.created_at) AS count_before FROM test2 t3 GROUP BY created_at;
